title: Iran announces halt of military offensive against Israel — condition: will resume if Israel strikes southern Lebanon or further aggression; announced minutes after Trump's 'immediate stop' call
snippet: Iran announced a halt of its military offensive against Israel. The announcement came minutes after Trump called for an 'immediate stop' to attacks. Iran's condition: operations will resume if Israel strikes southern Lebanon or engages in further 'aggression and hostility.' This represents a de facto ceasefire without formal agreement. Covered by Al Jazeera, CNN liveblog, Washington Times, Arab News.
tag_reason: Iran's formal announcement of military offensive halt is a new event — first such declaration since the June 7-8 escalation cycle; establishes conditional ceasefire framework with Lebanon linkage
